context.projectOverview: Architect Decision Lens Panel — Sprint 3: refactor runArchitect Checkpoint 5 (review/assembly) into a discrete seam. Panel ON: assemble the draft architecture+ADRs, fan out one lens REVIEWER per lens (bounded by maxConcurrent), reconcile() a pass/fail verdict (fail-closed on tie) that gates final assembly. Panel OFF: CP5 runs as today (single-agent within the monolithic loop), byte-identical. Builds on Sprint 2's runArchitectPanel seam.

completedSprints.title: TS CP2 synthesis panel
completedSprints.summary: runArchitect gates on config.architect?.panel -> runArchitectSingleLoop (off, byte-identical) | runArchitectPanel (genApproaches + mapBounded per-lens score + synthesize winner + continuation CP1/3/4/5). ArchitectResult.lensScores + selectedApproach additive optional. mapBounded private helper exists. Commits 6f82cea + 1d02543.

gitNote: Pre-existing unrelated uncommitted changes exist. Stage ONLY: git add src/orchestrator/architect-agent.ts src/orchestrator/architect-agent.test.ts. NEVER `git add -A`. CRITICAL: CP5 panel is additive within runArchitectPanel (Sprint 2's on-path); the OFF path (runArchitectSingleLoop) stays byte-identical. reconcile() is REUSED from src/orchestrator/workflow/reconciler.ts (import, do not reimplement). Mock createClient + runAgenticLoop. A failing panel verdict must be RECORDED in the result (not silently dropped). Branch bober/architect-lens-panel — never main.
